q.en: How does Morty feel about grown-up parties at the start of the story?
q.zh: 在故事开头，莫蒂对成人派对是什么感受？

options.en: Bored—he thinks they seem really boring
options.zh: 无聊——他觉得派对很无聊

explain.en: Morty groans, 'Grown-up parties must be really boring,' and complains there is 'No piñata... No goodie bags.'
explain.zh: 莫蒂抱怨道：“成人派对一定很无聊”，并抱怨“没有皮纳塔……没有礼品袋”。

q.en: What does Morty spread on the bagels instead of cream cheese?
q.zh: 莫蒂在百吉饼上抹了什么来代替奶油芝士？

explain.en: The text says Morty took toothpaste 'the same color and consistency as the cream cheese' and 'squirted toothpaste on the bagels.'
explain.zh: 文中说莫蒂拿了“颜色和稠度与奶油芝士相同的”牙膏，“把牙膏挤在百吉饼上”。

q.en: Words like 'scheming' and 'mischievous' are used to describe Morty. This shows the reader he is...
q.zh: 书中用“scheming（密谋）”和“mischievous（淘气）”来形容莫蒂。这说明他是……

options.en: A tricky, playful character who is planning something
options.zh: 一个在策划某事的调皮、爱搞恶作剧的角色

explain.en: The story calls Morty 'mischievous' and his friends say 'Morty is definitely scheming' after he offers to help cook.
explain.zh: 故事称莫蒂“淘气”，在他主动提出帮忙做饭时朋友说“莫蒂肯定在密谋什么”。

q.en: What does Morty put in the blender with the bananas for the fruit punch?
q.zh: 莫蒂在搅拌机里和香蕉一起打进了什么来做水果宾治？

explain.en: The book says Morty 'tossed in six cloves of garlic and pushed the button labeled puree.'
explain.zh: 书中说莫蒂“扔进六瓣大蒜，按下标注为‘搅拌’的按钮”。

q.en: On the popcorn, Morty uses onion powder instead of...
q.zh: 在爆米花上，莫蒂用了洋葱粉而不是……

explain.en: Mother asks him to sprinkle 'cheese-flavored salt,' but Morty 'chose the onion powder instead.'
explain.zh: 妈妈让他撒“芝士风味盐”，但莫蒂“改选了洋葱粉”。

q.en: What happens to the guests after they taste the food?
q.zh: 客人们尝了食物后发生了什么？

options.en: They take a bite, gulp water, and leave early with upset stomachs
options.zh: 他们咬了一口、灌下水，然后带着不适的胃提前离开

explain.en: Father says: 'The guests took a bite, gulped water, and left early with upset stomachs.'
explain.zh: 爸爸说：“客人们咬了一口、灌下水，然后带着不适的胃提前离开了。”

q.en: What is a key character trait of Morty stated clearly in the book?
q.zh: 书中明确指出的莫蒂的一个关键性格特点是什么？

explain.en: The narrator states: 'There is one thing about Morty, HE ALWAYS TELLS THE TRUTH,' which is why he confesses.
explain.zh: 叙述者说：“莫蒂有一点，他总是说真话”，所以他坦白了。

q.en: Where does Mother get her fancy snack ideas?
q.zh: 妈妈从哪里得到她那些花哨的小吃点子？

explain.en: The book says Mother found 'all of her fancy snack ideas' in Good Mousekeeping magazine.
explain.zh: 书中说妈妈“所有的花哨小吃点子”都来自《好鼠管家》杂志。

q.en: The author most likely wrote this story to...
q.zh: 作者写这个故事最可能的目的是……

options.en: Entertain readers with a funny trick-and-consequence tale
options.zh: 用一则搞笑的恶作剧及其后果的故事娱乐读者

options.en: Explain how to plan a party

explain.en: It is a humorous Morty Mouse story about a prank that backfires, meant to make readers laugh.
explain.zh: 这是一个幽默的莫蒂老鼠故事，讲一个适得其反的恶作剧，目的是逗读者发笑。

q.en: How does Morty try to make up for ruining the parents' party?
q.zh: 莫蒂试图如何弥补自己毁掉父母派对的行为？

options.en: He throws a surprise barbeque party for his parents using his own money
options.zh: 他用自己攒的钱为父母办了一场惊喜烧烤派对

explain.en: Morty uses birthday money plus lemonade-stand earnings to invite guests to a 'Surprise Barbeque Party for his parents.'
explain.zh: 莫蒂用生日钱加上柠檬水摊赚的钱，邀请客人参加“为父母举办的惊喜烧烤派对”。

prompt.en: Design a 'real' (non-sneaky) snack menu that Morty could safely serve at his surprise barbeque party for his parents.
prompt.zh: 设计一份莫蒂可以在为父母办的惊喜烧烤派对上安全提供的“真正”（不搞鬼）小吃菜单。

en: List three simple, safe snacks a mouse child could make.
Keep it fun and different from the ruined toothpaste/garlic onion treats.
zh: 列出三款小鼠孩子能做的简单、安全的小吃。
要好玩，并且不同于被毁掉的牙膏、大蒜、洋葱料理。
